scripts.build: npm install --prefix bella-frutta-web-main && npm run build --prefix bella-frutta-web-main && cp bella-frutta-web-main/out/ja.html bella-frutta-web-main/out/index.html && cp bella-frutta-web-main/out/ja/*.html bella-frutta-web-main/out/ && rm -rf bella-frutta-web-main/out/ja bella-frutta-web-main/out/ja.html
